live_default.production_ui: unchanged — flag off; FeasibilityCanvas sole 2D path

flag_on_behavior.interaction: pointer-events on fabric only when activeTool=select; otherwise none so walls/draw tools keep ownership
flag_on_behavior.write_path: object:modified → updateEntityInProject(furniture, entityId, {position, rotation}) — document mm, not Fabric JSON

concerns: Pan/zoom transform is not shared with FeasibilityCanvas; fabric uses DEFAULT_FABRIC_STAGE_TRANSFORM (same initial as FeasibilityCanvas). After pan/zoom, furniture overlay desyncs until a later sync slice.

Dual pointer ownership: when select+flag, fabric host is pointer-events:auto over the full stage (empty space also blocks feasibility select/pick). Acceptable for narrow proof; not production dual-mode.
No browser smoke of fabric mount in this run (unit mapper only). Enable env and manual/smoke for live canvas.
